Full edition -- supply your own data
====================================

This is the FULL build (registered Wolfenstein 3D, all six episodes). It does
NOT include game data: that data is copyrighted and not redistributable, so you
must provide your own from a copy you own (GOG, Steam, the original discs, ...).

Copy these eight files into THIS folder, renamed to LOWERCASE:

    vswap.wl6     gamemaps.wl6   maphead.wl6    audiohed.wl6
    audiot.wl6    vgadict.wl6    vgagraph.wl6   vgahead.wl6

Retail installs usually ship them UPPERCASE (VSWAP.WL6, ...). Rename to lowercase
-- filenames are case-sensitive on Linux and the engine looks for lowercase.

Then run the wolf3d-pt executable in the parent folder. If you only have the
shareware data (*.wl1), use the shareware build instead.
